decisions.decision: Windows Task Scheduler for scheduled tasks, PM2 for long-running services
decisions.reason: Survives reboots, native Windows GUI, no terminal needed

decisions.decision: Apify Indeed Scraper API over Puppeteer
decisions.reason: Reliable, no 403 blocks, structured data, faster

decisions.decision: Zoho Mail (claude.navada@zohomail.eu) as primary, Gmail as fallback
decisions.reason: Claude gets own email identity, professional NAVADA branding
Shared Claude sessions + Task Scheduler provide same functionality. PC is always-on server.

decisions.decision: SSH key auth (SSH.id) + Chrome Remote Desktop
decisions.reason: Microsoft account blocks SSH password auth. CRD for visual access.
Avoid overwhelm. Full list stays in tracker.

_instructions: Log significant decisions with reasoning so future sessions don't re-ask.
